hero.description: Experience the next generation of AI video creation with Sora 2 from OpenAI. Generate high-quality videos from text prompts or images with unprecedented realism, accurate physics simulation, and enhanced steerability.

steerability.title: Enhanced Steerability
steerability.description: Precise control over camera movements, scene transitions, and character actions through detailed prompts.

consistency.title: Object Permanence
consistency.description: Maintains consistent object appearance and behavior throughout the entire video sequence.

multimodal.title: Multi-Modal Input
multimodal.description: Generate videos from text descriptions, reference images, or combine both for maximum creative control.

0.question: What is Sora 2 and who developed it?
0.answer: Sora 2 is OpenAI's flagship video generation model. OpenAI describes it as a general-purpose video-and-audio generation system; on OpenCreator, specific output options depend on the mode and availability.

1.question: What types of content can I create with Sora 2?
1.answer: Sora 2 excels at creating a wide range of content including social media videos, brand advertisements, product showcases, cinematic scenes, animated content, and entertainment videos. It supports both text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

2.question: How long can Sora 2 videos be?
2.answer: On OpenCreator, Sora 2 supports multiple duration options depending on the mode. You can generate 8-second or 12-second videos, and Pro mode supports up to 25 seconds.

3.question: What makes Sora 2 different from other AI video models?
3.answer: Sora 2 stands out for its realistic physics simulation, object permanence, and enhanced steerability. It produces videos with unprecedented visual fidelity and can handle complex multi-object scenes while maintaining consistency throughout.

4.question: Can I use images as input for Sora 2?
4.answer: Yes! Sora 2 supports both text-to-video and image-to-video generation. You can provide reference images to guide the video generation, or combine text prompts with images for maximum creative control.

5.question: What resolution does Sora 2 support?
5.answer: Sora 2 generates videos in up to 1080p HD resolution, ensuring high-quality output suitable for professional use cases including social media, advertising, and content creation.

6.question: Is there a difference between Sora 2 and Sora 2 Pro on OpenCreator?
6.answer: Yes. On OpenCreator, Pro mode unlocks higher-end output options (such as longer duration and higher resolution). If you want maximum quality, pick Pro; for faster iteration, use the standard mode.

7.question: What aspect ratios can I generate with Sora 2?
7.answer: On OpenCreator, Sora 2 supports multiple aspect ratios depending on the workflow (commonly 16:9 and 9:16). Choose the ratio based on your target platform (YouTube vs TikTok/Reels).

8.question: Does Sora 2 generate audio on OpenCreator?
8.answer: OpenAI describes Sora 2 as a video-and-audio generation system. On OpenCreator, audio availability can vary by model mode and workflow. Check the output settings and preview to confirm whether audio is included.

9.question: How do I write better prompts for realism and physics?
9.answer: Use concrete, visual language and specify the key physical actions. Add constraints like camera framing, lighting, environment, and timing (e.g., “handheld close-up”, “slow push-in”, “golden hour”). Avoid contradictory instructions.

10.question: Can I control camera movement and shot style?
10.answer: Yes. Include camera instructions in your prompt (pan, dolly, zoom, tracking, lens style). For best results, keep camera direction simple and consistent, and avoid changing too many variables at once.

11.question: How does Sora 2 compare to Veo 3 on OpenCreator?
11.answer: Both are top-tier options. Veo 3 is known for native audio generation and strong audio-video synchronization, while Sora 2 emphasizes realism, physics, and longer clips depending on mode. The best choice depends on whether you prioritize audio or longer cinematic shots.

12.question: How much does Sora 2 cost on OpenCreator?
12.answer: Credits are consumed per generation and can vary by output settings (such as mode, resolution, and duration). The pricing section on this page shows the most up-to-date credit cost for your plan.
